title: Run onboarding fixtures without nested child processes
action: Replace the test-only spawnSync launcher with an asynchronous worker_threads direct-entry launcher per decision 17bfc14a. Preserve the real and fake launcher paths, argv, fake HOME and USERPROFILE, stdout, stderr, exit code, JSON parsing, and all existing assertions. Await worker exit plus both stream completions before returning the existing result shape; set execArgv to an empty array; mechanically await every launcher call. Do not modify production onboarding or introduce EPERM skips.

truths: The onboarding suite runs in managed Codex without child_process spawnSync.
Every existing onboarding assertion still executes against the real or fixture-local CLI entrypoint.
Worker exit, stdout end, and stderr end are all observed before JSON parsing.
No EPERM-specific skip or synthetic passing payload exists.

artifacts.substantive: Worker-based isolated CLI fixture launcher with all call sites awaited

key_links: runOnboardAt launches the provided scriptPath as the Worker entrypoint so fake-source authority tests remain honest.
The launcher forwards args and isolated home environment and returns the same status/stdout/stderr/payload contract.
prohibitions: Do not edit onboard_bee.mjs production behavior.
Do not remove, skip, soften, or conditionally pass existing assertions.
Do not fall back to spawnSync in Codex.

trace.outcome: Made the complete onboarding fixture suite executable in managed Codex without weakening CLI coverage.
trace.verification_evidence: {"tests_inspected":["skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs existing onboarding CLI assertions"],"tests_added_or_changed":["Worker-based test launcher and awaited call sites in test_onboard_bee.mjs"],"red_failure_evidence":"Before the fix, the configured onboarding suite failed immediately: spawnSync returned EPERM, plan/apply payloads were null, and the run exited 1.","verification_run":"After the fix, node --check exited 0; the complete onboarding suite reported PASS - failures: 0, skipped: 1; git diff --check exited 0.","deliberate_exceptions":["The existing case-alias fixture remains skipped on the case-sensitive /tmp filesystem; no onboarding assertion was removed or converted into an EPERM skip."]}
trace.verify_output: node --check: exit 0; onboarding suite: PASS - failures: 0, skipped: 1; git diff --check: exit 0 with no output
